data.title: RMX Industries appoints Major General (Ret.) Michael S. Repass to Advisory Board, bringing 30 years of experience.
data.description: Renowned Special Forces Commander with 30 years of elite operational experience and international defense knowledge joins RMX Industries, Inc. in Dallas. This company, traded as RMXI on OTCQB, focuses on developing essential technology for mission-critical purposes. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Yorkville America Equities plans to acquire God Bless America ETF (YALL) for reorganization into Truth Social Funds.
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida, on January 28, 2026, it was reported that Yorkville America Equities, LLC, the sponsor and investment advisor for Truth Social Funds, has finalized a deal to reorganize the God Bless America ETF (with the Ticker: YALL) into the Truth Social Funds. The transition marks a significant move in the investment landscape and signifies a shift in focus.

data.title: FDA halts two Regenxbio gene therapies after patient tumor; stock plummets.
data.description: On Wednesday, the FDA surprisingly halted the progress of two of Regenxbio's gene therapies after a patient was diagnosed with a tumor. This unexpected update significantly impacted Regenxbio stock, causing a downturn in market performance.

data.title: Tesla is releasing earnings after the close, focusing on Elon Musk's robotaxi comments. Stock is below key levels.
data.description: Following the market close, Tesla is set to release its earnings report, with a particular emphasis on Elon Musk's discussion during the conference call regarding robotaxis and other key topics. The anticipation is heightened as Tesla's stock currently resides below significant levels. Investors are eager to decipher Musk's insights during this pivotal moment for the company.

data.title: Teva Pharma stock slides on weak 2026 guidance despite beating Q4 forecasts. Generics drugmaker.
data.description: Teva's stock saw a decline at the start of Wednesday trading due to weaker guidance for 2026. Despite this setback, the pharmaceutical company, which specializes in generic drugs, exceeded expectations in the fourth quarter. The post highlights the contrast between Teva's performance in Q4 and the cautious outlook for 2026, leading to a drop in the stock value.

data.title: Nextpower stock surged before market open despite Trump's criticism of the sector. Analysts praised fiscal Q3 earnings.
data.description: On Wednesday, Nextpower surged significantly as analysts praised its strong fiscal third-quarter earnings. Despite criticism from Trump, the company's stock is poised for a breakout.

data.title: UK regulator restricts Coinbase ads due to promoting crypto as a fix for financial worries, violating cost-of-living claims.
data.description: The Advertising Standards Authority found ads to be irresponsible for portraying cryptocurrency as a remedy for common financial worries.

data.title: Leslie Clark to succeed Dave Simpson as President and CEO of Carolinas AGC on April 1, 2027. Dave to serve as consultant for a year.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 28, 2026, Carolinas AGC (CAGC) revealed that Leslie Clark is set to take over from Dave Simpson as the new President and CEO of CAGC from April 1, 2027. Dave will transition into a consulting role for a year to facilitate a smooth handover. This change in leadership aims to maintain stability within the organization.

data.title: Smartpress.com is becoming a crucial printer for finance marketing by offering innovative solutions to the industry.
data.description: Smartpress.com, an online printer based in Chanhassen, Minnesota, announced on January 28, 2026, their launch of a range of high-impact, data-driven solutions tailored for the financial services sector. This move aims to revolutionize print marketing strategies for financial institutions. This initiative by Smartpress.com signifies a significant push towards innovative approaches within the industry.

data.title: Hyperliquid (HYPE) rallies 65%, surpassing XRP and BNB. Sellers dump millions, driving price from $45 to $21.70. Treasury companies buying millions.
data.description: Hyperliquid (CRYPTO: HYPE) has surged by 65% this week, outshining larger tokens like XRP (CRYPTO: XRP). This increase in value can be attributed to two major sellers ceasing to unload millions of HYPE tokens, thereby eliminating a substantial portion of the overhead supply. The Tornado Cash-supported cluster and Continue Capital concluded their liquidation process recently, having sold off millions of tokens over several weeks. This selling pressure had initially driven HYPE prices from a high of $45 to a low of $21.70, but with these sellers no longer in the market, the price has rebounded. Additionally, Digital Asset Treasuries have been accumulating millions of HYPE tokens, with Hyperliquid Strategies (NASDAQ: PURR) actively acquiring tokens, and Hyperion DeFi Inc (NASDAQ: HYPD) holding over 1.4 million HYPE tokens - making them the first U.S. publicly listed company with a strategic HYPE treasury. Hyperliquid now dominates approximately 60% of all tokenized asset trading, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Cabbacis (OTCQB: CABI) issues shareholder letter from Chairman & CEO Joseph Pandolfino in Niagara Falls, N.Y.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Cabbacis (OTCQB: CABI) shared a letter from their Chairman and CEO, Joseph Pandolfino, addressed to shareholders. The letter discusses important updates and insights about the company's operations.

data.title: St. Thomas University ties for first place in global business strategy competition with two senior teams earning international recognition.
data.description: In Miami Gardens, Florida, on January 28, 2026, two teams of senior students from St. Thomas University (STU) achieved global success in the Business Strategy Game (BSG) by McGraw-Hill Education, Inc. Specifically, Team A SMIF from STU received international acknowledgment for their performance in the advanced online business simulation.

data.title: Intersolar Africa 2026 in Nairobi to boost region's solar growth. Conference on 3–4 Feb 2026 at Sarit Expo Centre to showcase opportunities.
data.description: In Pforzheim, Germany and Nairobi, Kenya, East Africa is becoming a key region for solar power and battery storage, with notable developments in the sector. The upcoming Intersolar Africa event on 3–4 February 2026 at the Sarit Expo Centre in Nairobi signifies the region's increasing importance, transitioning from the successful Intersolar Summit Africa event in 2025 to a comprehensive international exhibition and conference. Rapid population growth, industrialization, and escalating electricity needs are propelling East Africa's energy market forward, showcasing promising opportunities for growth and innovation.

data.title: SOL's price could reach $135-142 by Feb with mixed technical signals. Trading at $126.75, may surge on breaking resistances.
data.description: The current trading price of Solana is $126.75, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing neutral and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicating bearish momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a potential for upside movement to reach $135-142 if Solana is able to surpass crucial resistance levels.

data.title: Phunware launches revamped website showcasing advancements in flagship hospitality platform and products.
data.description: Phunware has recently launched a newly redesigned corporate website that showcases the development of their leading hospitality platform and enhanced products. The revamped website features a modern design and improved user experience, offering insights into the company's growth and advancements in the industry. This initiative aims to provide stakeholders with a comprehensive overview of Phunware's innovative solutions and services.
